# AI Quality Loops Adapter

ID: `component:ai-quality-loops-adapter`
Kind: `component`
Profile: `public`

Dependency-free adapter shape that maps WorkLoop slice outcome context into an ai-quality-loops review request and returns WorkLoop peer-review evidence.
